readContract.meaning: Login, refresh, and GET /api/stats are read-only proof paths. They must not recompute or increment cumulative question count or study time.

studentVisibleTruth.localFallbackBoundary: Local browser records are offline context and recent-activity display only. They are not cumulative truth when a server-progress-snapshot exists.

uiAnchors: 累计题数和学习时长来自 server-progress-snapshot
KV fallback 只是降级 no-drift
D1/R2 未绑定不能叫完整生产
verificationCommands: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('modules/progress-module.html','utf8'); const script=html.match(/<script>\\s*([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>\\s*<\\/body>/)[1]; new Function(script);"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const zlib=require('zlib'); const raw=fs.readFileSync('data/fluid-round390-progress-server-truth.json'); JSON.parse(raw); const gz=zlib.gunzipSync(fs.readFileSync('data/fluid-round390-progress-server-truth.json.gz')); if (!raw.equals(gz)) throw new Error('gzip mismatch');"
nonClaims: This worker did not bind D1/R2 or R2 resources.
KV fallback is not described as full production.
Private-video production recovery is not claimed.
